experience.title: Business Development
experience.description: Initially appointed as a contract manger where I sucessfully implemented a robust contracting process before being promoted to Business Development. My role is to develop the direct corporate segment of the business. Working closely alongside our digital marketing and reservations team allowed me to gain a strong understanding of corporate travel solutions and its market needs. My core duties: - Identify key commercial opportunities and convert business leads - Establish, manage and develop corporate client accounts - Create account management intelligence reports and professionally manage all appropriate paperwork - Build confidence and trust of key corporate clients and property provider partners - Negotiate contracts between accommodation providers and corporate clients - Building strong relationships within the Team and Key Players in the market

experience.title: Contract Manager - France, Belgium
experience.description: The TotalStay Group launched in the UK in 1999 and has steadily grown into one of the largest and most successful accommodation providers today, used by thousands of tour operators, travel agencies and incoming agencies across the globe. Exclusively Hotels is TotalStay’s established trade brand, distributing hotel product across European markets, and an increasing range of international locations too. Our product comprises an inventory of 100,000 hotels, from budget to 5 star luxury, in over 10,000 destinations worldwide. Core destinations are contracted directly and complimented by small, regional DMC’s and major global wholesalers. From a customer care perspective, our dedicated, multi-lingual and friendly call-centre is on hand 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to provide our clients with an unrivaled level of support, service and reassurance. Our Mission statement provides a good introduction to The TotalStay Group: “Our aim has not changed since we launched in 1999. It’s really simple. To take our passion for hotels and provide our global partners with choice, expertise and reassuringly good service.”
